column14: Clearview AI is a facial recognition system used by law enforcement agencies to identify people from photos or videos. It works by comparing an uploaded image against a massive database of pictures collected from social media and other public websites, returning possible matches within seconds. In this context, New York police departments have used the tool to assist in investigations and identify suspects.

column14: Patternizr is an artificial intelligence tool used by the NYPD to find patterns across thousands of crime reports. It analyzes details like the method of entry, location, time, and type of weapon to identify crimes that may have been committed by the same person or group. By automatically grouping related cases, it helps detectives make connections more quickly, prioritize investigations, and focus resources on identifying suspects. In this context, Patternizr serves as an investigative aid designed to speed up case-solving and improve efficiency across the department.
